## Summary

Adds a focused policy document for Issue #1024 covering blocked Revise card quarantine.

## Scope

Docs only. Defines:

- blocked cards are not user inventory
- normal users never see blocked candidate prose
- blocked cards need a non-user-facing retention/quarantine model
- admin/support diagnostics should be reason-code first
- regeneration must still pass all admission gates
- default telemetry remains content-free

## Related

- #1024

## Validation

Docs-only PR. No runtime behavior changed.
